tiers.label: Official
tiers.description: Content originating from official Crypto Moonboys or GraffPUNKS channels
rules: Must be traceable to an official account or domain
No editorial override required for inclusion

tiers.label: Community
tiers.description: Content produced by verified community members or trusted fan contributors
rules: Must be attributed to an identifiable contributor

tiers.label: Speculative
tiers.description: Unverified, inferred, or third-party sources with uncertain provenance
rules: Must be clearly labelled as speculative
Editorial approval required before any wiki usage

scoring_rules.description: Official sources multiply base confidence by tier score_weight (1.0)
Community sources multiply base confidence by 0.65
Speculative sources are capped at 0.50 regardless of base
Items with no identifiable source default to speculative tier
scoring_rules.formula: if source_id is null → assign speculative tier
